one_time_description: ILMF claim settlement of $26,000,000 received, with equivalent contribution to the Okikendawt Hydro and Dokis Community Trust
economic_notes: Dokis First Nation holds 99.5% interest in Migisi Hydro L.P. (hydroelectric business enterprise). Also holds investment in Okikendawt Hydro L.P. and Ontario First Nation Sovereign Wealth L.P. ILMF land claim settlement of $26M received and transferred to community trust.
notes: Large one-time ILMF land claim settlement of $26M received and immediately contributed to Okikendawt Hydro and Dokis Community Trust (net zero impact on surplus). Migisi Hydro L.P. accounted for under modified equity method (99.5% owned). Six inactive subsidiaries consolidated. 2020 figures restated per note 23. ILMF settlement receivable of $26,923,951 on balance sheet offset by $26,000,000 due to Okikendawt Hydro and Dokis Community Trust.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
